title: rubus menkei subsp. brachyadenes
intro: Rubus menkei subsp. brachyadenes is a plant species within the Rubus genus, which is a type of bramble or raspberry plant. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus menkei subsp. brachyadenes include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
